# Total CMS

> Total CMS is a modern, flat-file content management system built with PHP. It uses JSON storage instead of a traditional database, Twig for templating, and provides a comprehensive REST API and admin dashboard.

Total CMS is designed for web designers and developers who want a powerful CMS without database complexity. Content is stored as JSON files, making it easy to version control, backup, and deploy. It runs on any PHP 8.2+ host with no database setup required.

## Key Features

- Flat-file JSON storage (no database required)
- 13 built-in collection types (blog, image, gallery, etc.)
- Twig templating with 50+ custom filters and functions
- Full REST API for headless CMS usage
- Admin dashboard with 20+ form field types
- Image processing with watermarking
- Multi-backend caching (APCu, Redis, Memcached, filesystem)
- Access groups and role-based permissions
- JumpStart data import/export system
- Barcode and QR code generation
- CSV/JSON import and export
- White label admin customization (Pro edition)

## Documentation

- [Getting Started](https://docs.totalcms.co/getting-started/getting-started/): Introduction to Total CMS features and quick start guide
- [Installation](https://docs.totalcms.co/getting-started/installation/): PHP 8.2+ requirements, extensions, and web server setup
- [Configuration](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/configuration/): Hierarchical PHP settings for all system options
- [Twig Overview](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/overview/): Templating basics with variables, filters, and template inheritance
- [REST API](https://docs.totalcms.co/api/rest-api/): Complete API reference for CRUD operations
- [Collection Settings](https://docs.totalcms.co/collections/settings/): Configure collection behavior, display, and access control
- [Twig Filters](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/filters/): 50+ filters for text, color, array, date, and markdown processing
- [Twig Functions](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/functions/): Form helpers, math, string utilities, hashing, and media embedding
- [CMS Adapter](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/totalcms/): The `cms` global variable reference for collections, objects, and images
- [Collection Filtering](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/collection-filtering/): Filter and sort with comparison operators, date ranges, and ordering
- [Forms](https://docs.totalcms.co/twig/forms/): Build forms with premade forms, custom builders, and deck forms
- [Access Groups](https://docs.totalcms.co/auth/access-groups/): Role-based CRUD permissions for collections and admin access
- [Data Model](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/data-model/): 13 collection types, 16 property types, and JSON object storage
- [Deployment](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/deployment/): Git workflows, cache clearing, and CI/CD integration
- [Security](https://docs.totalcms.co/advanced/security/): HTTPS, HTML/SVG sanitization, upload restrictions, and headers

## Optional

- [Full documentation for LLMs](https://docs.totalcms.co/llms-full.txt)
